title: NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
summary: NVIDIA Cosmos 3 is a unified foundation model (an 'omni-model') that integrates world generation, physical reasoning, and action generation into a single system using a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture. Two variants are released: Cosmos 3 Nano (16B parameters: 8B reasoner + 8B generator) for efficient edge inference, and Cosmos 3 Super (64B parameters: 32B reasoner + 32B generator) for large-scale deployments. The model is open-sourced on Hugging Face and targets robotics, autonomous vehicles, and smart spaces.
